name: get_zone_schedules
description: Retrieves all available heating schedule templates (timetables) for a specific zone. Returns the list of preconfigured schedule options (e.g., ONE_DAY, THREE_DAY, SEVEN_DAY) that can be applied to the zone, including their IDs and types. Used to display available schedule options for users to select from.

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home/installation

zone_id.description: The unique identifier of the heating zone/room
